page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, resulting in 2 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 4.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It lacks local storage and dedicated GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate entry-level performance characteristics. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests both scored 767.39, placing the instance in the bottom 10% of tested hardware. Similarly, the Passmark CPU score of 2713.74 and database operations score of 677.75 fall into the lower performance tier. Memory bandwidth tests show 99.87 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 22.35 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. However, single-threaded compression and decompression tasks perform at average levels, with gzip compression reaching 24.5 GB/sec and bzip3 decompression achieving 9.16 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation but modest memory capacity and lower-tier benchmark performance, this server offers a cost-efficient entry point for compute-bound tasks that do not require large memory footprints or high-speed local storage. It is suitable for lightweight web serving, basic background processing, single-threaded compression tasks, and low-traffic application testing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It is configured with 4.0 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core, and lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps. Performance benchmarks place this server in the lower tier for multi-core processing, database operations, and memory bandwidth, though it achieves average performance in single-threaded gzip compression (24.5 GB/sec) and bzip3 decompression (9.16 GB/sec). This hardware profile is best suited for lightweight, compute-oriented workloads, basic web serving, and development environments that require dedicated CPU resources without massive memory or storage demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 server with 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight compute tasks and basic web serving.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large features 2 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 1 Gbps network bandwidth for lightweight compute workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly, dedicated dual-core x86 server designed for lightweight compute tasks and basic single-threaded processing workloads.
bullet_points: Two dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 CPU cores running at 2.6 GHz
4.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Average performance in single-threaded compression and decompression
Best suited for lightweight web serving and development environments
